label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. Jane booked a flight for tomorrow, which is July 29, 2002. So today must be July 28, 2002. The question is asking for the date one week ago from today. So if today is July 28, 2002, then one week ago would be subtracting seven days from that date. Let me count backwards. July has 31 days, right? So starting from July 28, subtracting one day would be July 27, then 26, 25, 24, 23, 22... Wait, subtracting seven days total. Let me count again: July 28 (today) minus 1 day: July 27 Minus 2 days: July 26 Minus 3 days: July 25 Minus 4 days: July 24 Minus 5 days: July 23 Minus 6 days: July 22 Minus 7 days: July 21 So one week ago from July 28 would be July 21, 2002.
